timeline.lyric: The Mage said box! The box is law!
timeline.real_meaning: The traditionalist's desperate cry: Appealing to authority ('The founder said so!') rather than accepting undeniable empirical evidence.

media.query: Wide shot: The tribe is in complete disarray. Some worship the box, some worship the stones.

hidden_media.query: Wide shot: A massive, screaming protest outside a tech headquarters. Signs waving, police barricades in place.

timeline.core_pt: Apelar à autoridade, não à evidência.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: O grito desesperado do tradicionalista: Apelar à autoridade ('O fundador disse isso!') em vez de aceitar evidências empíricas incontestáveis.

timeline.lyric: The box is everything we saw!
timeline.real_meaning: Confirmation bias as faith: 'I saw the box make fire once, therefore the entire absurd system must be eternally true.'

media.query: Wide panning shot: The camp is lit by competing fires. The tension is unbearable. Shadows dance violently on the cave walls.

hidden_media.query: Medium shot: The algorithm at work. Servers parsing the anger, converting the screaming into targeted advertising revenue.

timeline.core: I saw it once, so it must be eternal.
timeline.core_pt: Eu vi uma vez, então deve ser eterno.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: Vieses de confirmação como fé: 'Eu vi a caixa fazer fogo uma vez, portanto, o sistema absurdo inteiro deve ser eternamente verdadeiro.

timeline.lyric: Muda's wrong, she breaks the rules!
timeline.real_meaning: The heretic label: Anyone who threatens the monopoly of truth must be cancelled, silenced, or destroyed by the establishment.

media.query: A vast, firelit prehistoric valley. Towering rocks form a colossal box structure, casting long shadows.

hidden_media.query: A sprawling cityscape at night, neon lights reflect on rain-soaked streets, people rush home from work, with a huge digital billboard displaying the phrase "Terms of Service" in bo

timeline.core_pt: Ameace o monopólio, seja cancelado.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: A etiqueta de herege: Quem quer que ameace o monopólio da verdade deve ser cancelado, silenciado ou destruído pela instituição.

timeline.lyric: We are the faithful, we are the tools!
timeline.real_meaning: Proud submission: Wearing servitude as an identity. The Gralhistas proudly declaring themselves the faithful tools of the system.

media.query: A vast prehistoric landscape at dusk, a towering wooden box center frame, smoke rising from distant fires.

hidden_media.query: A sprawling cityscape at dusk, neon lights reflect off rain-soaked streets, skyscrapers cast long shadows, a lone figure stands in the center of the frame, holding a glowing tablet

timeline.core_pt: Orgulhosas ferramentas do sistema.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: Orgulhosa submissão: Usando a servidão como identidade. Os Gralhistas se declarando orgulhosamente as ferramentas fiéis do sistema.

timeline.lyric: Look at the stone! Look at your hand!
timeline.real_meaning: Muda's empirical counter: Look at the physical reality in your own hand. Trust your senses over their corporate narrative.

media.query: A vast prehistoric landscape at dusk. Firelit huts scattered, smoke rising. Giant box monument looms.

hidden_media.query: A sprawling cityscape at dusk, skyscrapers reflected in a dark river, a large screen displaying a scrolling Terms of Service agreement.

timeline.core: Trust your senses, not their narrative.
timeline.core_pt: Confie nos seus sentidos, não na narrativa deles.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: Muda's contador empírico: Observe a realidade física em sua própria mão. Confie em seus sentidos em vez de sua narrativa corporativa.

timeline.lyric: The fire rises when you understand!
timeline.real_meaning: Knowledge is the real power: Not brand loyalty, not tribal membership, but the fundamental understanding of how the world works.

media.query: A vast prehistoric valley, a towering wooden Box at the center, smoke billowing, warm firelight illuminating the stone structures. A single figure at the Box, back to the camera.
Two figures face each other, fire burning in a pit between them, one figure raising a torch, the other looking on.

hidden_media.query: A sprawling cityscape at dusk, neon lights reflect on wet streets, massive screens display scrolling terms of service, people walking by looking at phones.
A tense city park, two separate groups protesting, one holding tech brand flags, the other with placards of cancel symbols, a fire barrel in the middle.

timeline.core_pt: Entendimento é o verdadeiro poder.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: Conhecimento é o verdadeiro poder: não a lealdade à marca, não a pertença tribal, mas a compreensão fundamental de como o mundo funciona.

timeline.lyric: The Mage is just a guy with tricks!
timeline.real_meaning: Demystifying the elite: The CEO is just a person, the tech guru is just a salesman. The Mage is just a guy with a plastic trick.

media.query: A vast prehistoric valley under a fiery sunset, smoke from distant fires swirling,  the Box looms large at the center.  A dark figure stands atop, looking out.

hidden_media.query: A sprawling cityscape at dusk, neon lights reflect off rain-soaked streets, a corporate tower looms in the center.

timeline.core: The CEO is just a salesman.
timeline.core_pt: O CEO é apenas um vendedor.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: Desmistificando a elite: o CEO é apenas uma pessoa, o guru da tecnologia é apenas um vendedor. O Mago é apenas um cara com um truque de plástico.

timeline.lyric: The spark is yours, it's in the sticks!
timeline.real_meaning: Open-source empowerment: The spark belongs to the commons. Power resides in nature, in the sticks, in community.

media.query: A vast prehistoric landscape, a massive stone box sits center, firelit, casting a warm glow.
Two tribes face off, one in a box-like formation, the other around a blazing fire.

hidden_media.query: Dystopian cityscape. Corporate skyscrapers. Ominous grey clouds.
Crowd split. One side: tech gadgets, trendy clothes. Other side: protest signs, determined faces.

timeline.core: The spark belongs to the commons.
timeline.core_pt: A faísca pertence ao comum.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: Empoderamento de código aberto: A faísca pertence aos comuns. O poder reside na natureza, nos galhos, na comunidade.

timeline.real_meaning: The culture war schism: Democrat vs Republican, Science vs Faith. The same exact fire (human insecurity), just different names.

media.query: A vast prehistoric valley at dusk, a massive tree at the center, surrounded by primitive dwellings, firelight flickers, shadows dance on the landscape.

hidden_media.query: A vast cityscape at dusk, neon lights reflecting off rain-soaked streets, skyscrapers towering with digital billboards displaying conflicting news headlines.

timeline.core: The culture war sustains itself on fumes.
timeline.core_pt: A guerra cultural sustenta-se com fumaça.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: O cansaço se instala: os fogos do debate estão se apagando, mas ninguém admite isso. A guerra cultural sustenta-se puramente com fumaça.

timeline.real_meaning: Burning the same fuel: The tragic irony that both sides are powered by the exact same human fear and need for belonging.

media.query: A vast, prehistoric landscape at dusk, a towering, box-shaped structure dominates the horizon. Firelit settlements sprawl beneath a vast sky.

hidden_media.query: A sprawling cityscape at night, neon lights reflecting on rain-soaked streets, skyscrapers towering, digital billboards flashing.

timeline.core_pt: Inimigos compartilhando a mesma escuridão.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: Inimigos compartilhando a mesma escuridão: A trágica realização de que as tribos opostas são idênticas em seu terror subjacente.

timeline.real_meaning: The anthem of polarization: Endless, deafening debate that generates massive heat but absolutely zero light. Engagement over enlightenment.

media.query: A vast prehistoric valley under a fiery sunset. Smoke billows from a distant cave, center of a primitive settlement.

timeline.core: The culture war sustains itself on fumes.
timeline.core_pt: A guerra cultural sustenta-se com fumaça.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: O cansaço se instala: os fogos do debate estão se apagando, mas ninguém admite isso. A guerra cultural sustenta-se puramente com fumaça.

timeline.real_meaning: The question that maintains the division: Asking 'which one is right' ensures the arguing continues, which is the point of the system.

media.query: Vast prehistoric valley, two towering rocks frame a bonfire. Warm tones, cinematic. Prehistoric landscape, Box is law.

timeline.core_pt: Ninguém se importa mais com a verdade.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: O eco vazio da pergunta: alguém ainda se importa com a verdade original, ou é apenas sobre a vitória tribal?

timeline.real_meaning: Tribal chanting (Gral-ha): Sports team mentality applied to survival. Identity formed entirely through opposition to the 'other'.

media.query: A vast, prehistoric valley at dusk.  Firelight from scattered campfires illuminate the landscape and the imposing Box structure.
Two rival tribes face off, firelight dancing on their faces.  One group, Gralhistas, stand united, eyes gleaming.

hidden_media.query: A bustling cityscape at dusk, skyscrapers reflecting cool blue hues, neon lights flickering. A protest and counter-protest on a street, flags and banners everywhere.
A tense city street corner, two opposing mobs face off, phones and cameras out. A lone figure stands between, arms raised in a call for peace.

timeline.core_pt: Identidade formada através da oposição.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: Canto tribal (Gral-ha): Mentalidade de equipe esportiva aplicada à sobrevivência. Identidade formada inteiramente através da oposição ao 'outro'.

timeline.real_meaning: The counter-chant (Mu-da): The rebellion becomes equally tribal, equally reductive. Both sides devolve into mindless slogans.

media.query: A vast prehistoric valley, fire pits dotting the landscape, tribal figures gathered around, a massive box towering over the scene.
Two tribes face each other, one side in a heated discussion, the other chanting fiercely, a frozen Tronco in the middle.
A close-up of a Gralhista's face, eyes ablaze with passion, mouth wide open in a defiant shout, warm tones.

hidden_media.query: Aerial view of a sprawling cityscape at dusk, neon lights reflect off rain-soaked streets, skyscrapers loom with digital billboards displaying terms of service.
Dueling protests in a bustling urban plaza, one side clad in neon blue, the other in neon red, phones raised, faces obscured by glowing screens.
up of a determined face, voice raised in a tribal chant, a reflection of a crowd of opposing voices on their smartphone screen.

timeline.core_pt: Rebelião se torna igualmente tribal.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: O contra-cântico (Mu-da): A rebelião se torna igualmente tribal, igualmente reductiva. Ambos os lados se degradam em slogans sem sentido.

timeline.real_meaning: Tronco, the paralyzed centrist: The moderate fence-sitter, defined by superficial indecision when caught between two raging extremes.

media.query: A vast prehistoric valley, two tribes camped apart, one by a towering rock formation, the other by a vast lake. Firelight casts long shadows under a starry sky.

hidden_media.query: A sprawling cityscape at dusk, neon lights reflecting off sleek skyscrapers, and protestors with megaphones and signs gathering in the streets.

timeline.core_pt: O centrista paralisado.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: Tronco, o centrista paralisado: O moderado que se sente na cerca, definido por uma indecisão superficial quando pego entre dois extremos furiosos.

timeline.real_meaning: The paralysis of reason: When both sides are screaming absolute certainties, the thoughtful, superficial person freezes in panic.

media.query: A vast prehistoric landscape bathed in warm, firelit hues.  A towering stone box dominates the scene, while two fires rage in the distance. Cinematic painterly.

hidden_media.query: A sprawling cityscape at dusk, neon lights reflecting off rain-soaked streets, skyscrapers looming, a sense of urban isolation and modern digital contracts.

timeline.core_pt: Ambos os lados gritam. A razão congela.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: A paralisia da razão: Quando ambos os lados gritam certezas absolutas, a pessoa pensativa e superficial congela de pânico.

timeline.lyric: He's got the box, she's got the spark
timeline.real_meaning: Complex truth reduced to binary: Team Box vs Team Spark. The nuance of reality compressed into a forced 'us vs them' choice.

media.query: A vast prehistoric plain stretches under a stormy sky. The silhouette of a towering rock formation looms in the distance. A single fire burns at the base.

hidden_media.query: A sprawling cityscape at dusk, neon lights reflecting on rain-soaked streets, towers of glass and steel looming. Protesters with smartphones clashing.

timeline.core_pt: Time Box vs Time Faísca.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: Verdade complexa reduzida a binário: Time Caixa vs Time Faísca. A sutileza da realidade comprimida em uma escolha forçada de 'nós vs eles'.

timeline.lyric: I'm just scared of the dark..."
timeline.real_meaning: The root of all ideology: 'I'm just scared of the dark.' Fear is the true engine driving every single -ism, tribe, and dogma.

media.query: A vast prehistoric landscape at dusk, a colossal stone box dominates the horizon, fire pits dot the scene, the warmth of the flames painting the sky in hues of orange and red.
A tense standoff between two tribes, one gathered around a roaring fire, the other huddled around an extinguished one, faces illuminated by the flickering flames, eyes fixed on eac
A close-up of a trembling hand reaching out towards the dying embers, fingers clutching at the remnants of warmth and light, the rest of the body obscured by shadows.

hidden_media.query: A sprawling cityscape at dusk, neon lights reflecting on rain-soaked streets, crowds protesting with banners, smart phones. Split screens of news broadcasts on digital billboards.
A tense stand-off at a city intersection, two opposing protest groups, faces obscured by masks, holding smartphones, displaying tribal symbols.
A close-up of a protester's eyes, wide with fear, tears streaming down their cheek, holding a smartphone with a news alert.

timeline.core_pt: O medo impulsiona todo -ismo.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: A raiz de toda ideologia: 'Eu só tenho medo do escuro.' O medo é o verdadeiro motor que impulsiona cada -ismo, tribo e dogma.

timeline.real_meaning: The schism becomes total identity: It ceases to be about the truth or the fire. You ARE your faction. The argument is the goal.

media.query: A vast prehistoric valley at dusk, two massive fires burning brightly, each side of the valley inhabited by different tribes, cinematic.
A close, dramatic struggle between two tribes, warm tones, firelight casting shadows on their faces.
The eyes of a warrior, one iris reflecting the orange firelight of their tribe, the other showing fear of the approaching dark.

timeline.real_meaning_pt: O cansaço se instala: os fogos do debate estão se apagando, mas ninguém admite isso. A guerra cultural sustenta-se puramente com fumaça.

timeline.real_meaning: Enemies sharing the same darkness: The tragic realization that the opposing tribes are identical in their underlying terror.

timeline.core_pt: Inimigos compartilhando a mesma escuridão.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: Inimigos compartilhando a mesma escuridão: A trágica realização de que as tribos opostas são idênticas em seu terror subjacente.

timeline.real_meaning: Exhaustion sets in: The fires of debate are burning out, but no one will admit it. The culture war sustains itself purely on fumes.

timeline.core: The culture war sustains itself on fumes.
timeline.core_pt: A guerra cultural sustenta-se com fumaça.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: O cansaço se instala: os fogos do debate estão se apagando, mas ninguém admite isso. A guerra cultural sustenta-se puramente com fumaça.

timeline.real_meaning: The empty echo of the question: Does anyone even care about the original truth anymore, or is it purely about tribal victory?

timeline.real_meaning: The creator abandons the collapse: God is dead, the founder cashed out, the wizard fled. The elite leave the masses to clean up the mess.

timeline.core: God is dead. The founder cashed out.
timeline.core_pt: Deus está morto. O fundador saiu do negócio.
timeline.real_meaning_pt: O criador abandona o colapso: Deus está morto, o fundador sacou o dinheiro, o mago fugiu. A elite deixa as massas limparem a bagunça.
